---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working as expected
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior, ideally including:

- The command you ran (e.g. `npx urldn-link-check docs/ --fail-on-http`)
- The Markdown snippet or file that triggers the issue
- Your `urldn-link-check` version (`npx urldn-link-check --version`)

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Please include the full console output or JSON
report if relevant.

## Environment

- OS:
- Node.js version:
- `urldn-link-check` version:
- Running as: CLI / GitHub Action

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here.
